# fasit_environment_values_across_envs (Data Source)

Get a list of all environment values across all environments for a given key



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) The key to get environment values for

### Read-Only

- `results` (Attributes List) The environment values for the given key (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--results))

<a id="nestedatt--results"></a>
### Nested Schema for `results`

Read-Only:

- `environment_id` (String) The ID of the environment the environment value belongs to
- `environment_name` (String) The name of the environment the environment value belongs to
- `key` (String) The key to get environment values for
- `secret` (Boolean) Marks the value as a secret in Fasit. A marked secrets is used for masking, and trigger secret-tainting of computed Helm values. Set to `true` for any sensitive value.
- `tenant_id` (String) The ID of the tenant the environment value belongs to
- `tenant_name` (String) The name of the tenant the environment value belongs to
- `value` (String) The value of the environment value. JSON encoded
